targets.queryText:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(steps), 0) AS value
FROM sport_details
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now')
  AND timestamp < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '+1 day');
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(steps), 0) AS value
FROM sport_details
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now')
  AND timestamp < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '+1 day');

targets.queryText:
SELECT reading AS value
FROM heart_rates
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
SELECT ROUND((min_percent + max_percent) / 2.0, 1) AS value
FROM blood_oxygen_samples
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
SELECT timestamp AS time, reading AS value
FROM heart_rates
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+00:00', 'now', '-24 hours')
ORDER BY timestamp;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT timestamp AS time, reading AS value
FROM heart_rates
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+00:00', 'now', '-24 hours')
ORDER BY timestamp;

targets.queryText:
SELECT start_timestamp, end_timestamp, total_minutes, is_provisional
FROM sleep_sessions
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY end_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 7;

targets.queryText:
SELECT finished_at AS last_successful_sync_utc, source, sync_id
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT finished_at AS last_successful_sync_utc, source, sync_id
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
